resources.string: Unlocked secure element successfully. Reboot your device.
This app allows you to tap your phone to open supported doors.
Updated User Agreement and Privacy Policy
"No card detected. Hold the card closer to the NFC area and make sure it supports NFC."
The card was removed too soon. Try again.
"When this feature is turned on, you'll be able to swipe cards by pressing the Power button twice. Turn on now?"
Turn on \"Double press Power button to swipe\"?
\"Double press Power button to swipe\" is on
"If you continue, you'll delete \"%1$s\" from this device. To use it again, you'll have to add it as a new card. Delete now?"
Hold your access card against the NFC area on the back of your phone
"This feature isn't available yet. Stay tuned!"
"There's an issue with your account. Try again."
"Couldn't verify account. Wait a minute or two and try again."
This embedded secure element is restricted
"An NFC error occurred. Couldn't get secure element info."
An error occurred while executing an NFC command
"Network isn't available. Connect to the network and try again."
Looks like the secure element of your device is locked. Make sure your device is connected to the network and NFC is turned on. Unlock secure element now?
NFC service error. Turn NFC off and back on, or reboot your device.
A server error occurred. Wait a minute or two and try again.
"Couldn't unlock secure element. Contact customer support."
Loading your cards. Keep your device connected to the network.
Cards are still loading. If you exit now, loading will stop.
Your card name and design changes will sync across all your devices.
"This card has encrypted data, so tapping may not unlock the door. If it doesn't work, use the physical card."
Keep the card still while scanning
This card is already on this phone
This feature is still in Beta testing and will be released soon. Try again later.
Notifications received while using Access cards
Create a Xiaomi Account via your phone number %s now?
Name must be longer than %d characters
This nickname is invalid. Try a different one.
This photo is invalid. Try a different one.
This email address is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
The email address you entered is invalid.
The text you entered is too long
"You haven't set the password yet. Sign in with SMS."
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Try again later.
The username you entered is invalid
This phone number is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
Too many attempts. Wait a minute or two and try again.
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
"We'll use this email to verify your account"
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
Check the URL and try again, or copy the URL and open it in your browser.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Try again."
Too many accounts have been associated with this number. Try a different one.
You need to sign in again

"We shall protect your personal information in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations. This app needs the following permissions to work normally:

Using camera (for setting your profile photo)

If you don't agree to grant such permissions, you won't be able to use some features of this app; however, its basic functionality will still be available to you. You can always restrict permissions or revoke your authorization in the Settings."
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
A system error occurred. Go back and try again.
This app needs to access selected Gallery items to be able to set your profile photo. Allow now?
"You've requested too many verification emails. Make sure that the verification email isn't in your inbox's Spam folder."
"Can't be the same as current password"
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
Add your phone number to protect your account.
Session expired. Sign in again to reconnect this account.
Too many attempts. Try other ways to sign in.
System is busy. Wait a minute or two and try again.
"The service isn't available. Make sure the app is installed and not blocked."
Check your network settings and try again

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_telecom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_unicom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Unicom verification services."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_default
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

resources.string: "We'll create an account automatically if you're using your phone number for the first time."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_with_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_with_telecom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_with_unicom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Unicom verification services."

resources.string: Your WhatsApp verification code will be sent to your recovery phone (<font color=#1F93FF>%s</font>).
The code you entered is incorrect
The format of the phone number you entered is invalid
The code you entered is incorrect
The code you entered is incorrect
When your device is powered on, <font color=#0D84FF>hold it near a card reader</font> to open the card list and select a card

"If you continue, you'll withdraw your consent to the Privacy Policy of Access cards. The personal information already collected and retained will be deleted within the specified period in accordance with applicable laws and regulations unless required otherwise. As Access cards provides its services based on the collection of the necessary personal information, your withdrawal of consent will be held as refusing to accept Access cards services and forfeiting all relevant assets and benefits. This may cause you certain losses, and your personal information can't be recovered afterward. Withdraw consent now?"
Your device needs to connect to the network for you to be able to withdraw consent. Check your network settings and try again.
Before trying to withdraw consent again, try the following actions:
Simulate existing access cards (e.g. compound and company access cards) to use from your phone
Reading your card. Keep it still.

"Important: Canceling the Access cards services is permanent and can't be undone. Make sure you've handled any related information and data. For your account and payment security, delete all access cards and any related cards from every device under your Xiaomi Account before submitting the request. After cancellation, your card activation history and deletion records will be removed. If you have questions or need help with Access cards, contact Xiaomi's customer support before canceling services. After cancellation, we won't be able to provide support for this service."
Before trying to cancel services again, try the following actions:
Your device needs to connect to the network for you to be able to cancel services. Check your network settings and try again.
"Here's what will change after you cancel services"
Grant the necessary permissions in Settings to be able to add an Access cards shortcut to the Home screen.
"Can't swipe cards. Allow Access cards to display on the Lock screen?"
Display card swiping status in a notification
This feature requires permission to send notifications as well as use Notification spotlight to be able to work normally. You can grant these permissions in Settings.
"Can't swipe cards. Allow Access cards to open new windows while running in the background?"
Unlock your door with your phone
Set this card as the default card now? This will replace your previous settings.
To use Access cards, sign in to your Xiaomi Account first.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Check your network settings and try again."
To use Access cards, turn on NFC first.
To unlock doors by tapping your phone, set access card as your default tap card.
To use Access cards, set it as your tap card. Set now?
Set access card as your default card?
Double tap to view all other cards
This card has encrypted data, so tapping may not unlock the door.
Bring your phone close to the reader
Fifth day of Chinese New Year
Fourth day of Chinese New Year
Second day of Chinese New Year
Seventh day of Chinese New Year
Sixth day of Chinese New Year
Third day of Chinese New Year
Double press Power button to swipe
Press the Power button twice to open the card list
Set Access cards as the default cards app
Add a Home screen shortcut for easy access
"Couldn't read the card. Make sure NFC is turned on."
You need to sign in again
